overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character walking through a desolate, snow-covered rocky wasteland at night. The scene features a sepia-brown color grade with low lighting, depicting an isolated environment with scattered boulders and distant atmospheric smoke.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path with steep left slope

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path beside a steep hillside

entered.detail: steep snow-covered hillside rising prominently on the left side
dark boulders scattered across the snow on the right side of the path
flat snow-covered terrain forming the walking surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a desolate snowy landscape, with a steep snow-covered slope rising on the left and scattered dark rocks visible on the right. The environment is dimly lit with a brownish sepia tone, creating an isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky snowfield with distant smoke

events.description: dark smoke plume becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through open terrain toward the distant smoke source

entered.detail: dark smoke rising from the horizon in the distance ahead
clusters of large dark rocks emerging from the snow

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up as the steep left slope recedes into the background. Large rock formations become prominent on the right, and a dark smoke plume appears on the distant horizon, indicating a destination ahead.

events.description: character comes to a brief stop before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to observe the smoke ahead before continuing toward it

entered.detail: rocks emitting thick dark smoke on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Approaching the source of the smoke, the character briefly stops to observe the billowing dark clouds rising from rocky outcrops ahead. The smoke plume grows larger and more detailed as the character continues forward through the rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, snow-covered wasteland that gradually opens up toward a distant source of smoke. It begins with the character walking steadily beside a steep, snow-covered slope under a dim, sepia-brown light. As the terrain expands, the steep slope recedes into the background and large rock formations become more prominent on the right, revealing a dark plume of smoke on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character briefly pauses to observe the billowing clouds rising from rocky outcrops ahead. Finally, the camera continues forward through the rocky terrain, causing the smoke plume to grow larger and more detailed as the destination is approached.
